statement: In every magma, Equation 2518 (`x = (y * ((x * z) * y)) * y`) implies Equation 1907 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (x * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0232
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x z) y)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op x w))
